description_long: This is a weathered wooden fence section composed of seven vertical planks, each with a slightly irregular top edge, giving the fence a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The planks are affixed to two horizontal rails, one near the top and one near the bottom, which provide structural support. The wood shows signs of aging, with visible grain, discoloration, and some minor surface stains, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The fence lacks any decorative elements or embellishments, focusing purely on function. The side views reveal the fence's thin profile and the way the planks are attached to the rails. This type of fence is commonly found in urban backyards, parks, or as a boundary marker in residential areas.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden fence section with seven vertical planks and two horizontal rails, showing signs of age and outdoor use. The top edge is uneven, and the design is purely functional with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven vertical planks, two horizontal rails, and the uneven top edge.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the fence and the alignment of the planks and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical planks and the attachment of the rails, with the same irregular top edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim structure and the way the planks are joined to the rails.
